speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Aaj subah nayi Sasu-maa ne fir taana maara ki unki khud ki beti ki pehli shaadi kitni successful hai aur main is ghar mein ek talaqshuda bojh hoon. Mera dimaag is naye sasural ke expectations aur apne bacche ki fikar se phata ja raha hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakti. Apne bacche ko is ghar mein chhat dilane ke liye mujhe subah se raat tak masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty-bound framing and focus on the child using Lens B.
text: Yeh sunkar samajh aa raha hai ki apne bacche ke future aur is naye ghar ki zimmedariyon ne tumhe ek aisi position mein la diya hai jahan apne hisse ka farz poora karna hi sab kuch ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki mere paas aur koi choice hi nahi hai. First marriage fail hone ke baad, yeh chhat meri bacchi ke liye bahut zaroori hai. To unke taane sun kar bhi, I just swallow my tears and keep working to prove my worth.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying fear of losing the child's security using Lens E.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek bohot bada darr baitha hua hai ki agar tumne thodi si bhi kamzori dikhayi, toh kahin tumhari bacchi ke sar se yeh sahara na chhin jaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Exactly. Samaj mein divorced auraton ko waise bhi achhi nazar se nahi dekhte, sab 'bojh' hi mante hain. Mere parents ne bhi hath khade kar diye the. Isliye yahan izzat bachane ke liye mujhe masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on duration using Lens D.
text: Itne waqt se lagatar is samaj ke bojhal tano aur pehli shaadi ke labels ka weight akele uthate uthate andar hi andar bohot ghutan hoti hogi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghutan toh bohot hoti hai. Subah 5 baje se kitchen aur saas ki sewa shuru ho jati hai. Mere present husband bas financial support dete hain, so I can't even argue back against his mother's cruelty.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how she emotionally manages this relentless routine without voicing her distress.
text: Jab roz itni thakan uthani padti hai aur tano par bina aawaz uthaye sab kuch sehna padta hai, toh is poore din ke dauran tum khud ke andar uthne wali takleef ko kaise manage karti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Manage kya karna hai? Main bas apni bacchi ka face dekhti hoon aur khud ko samjhati hoon ki yeh sab sirf uske liye hai. Apne baare mein sochna hi band kar diya hai maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her relational focus on the child over her own needs using Lens C.
text: In saare mushkil halaat ke beech, tumhara dhyan aur himmat puri tarah se sirf is baat par tiki hai ki tumhari bacchi ka future aur rishta is ghar se juda rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Haan, uska future hi ab meri priority hai. Par sachi bataun, my energy level is totally zero now. It feels incredibly heavy to wake up every morning knowing ki aaj phir se masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed deep exhaustion underlying her daily routine.
text: Lagta hai ki is roj ki lagatar double duty aur apne wajood ko dabakar rakhne ki wajah se tum andar se poori tarah exhaustion se bhar chuki ho, jahan ek naya din shuru karna bhi bohot bhaari mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It really is heavy. Main uske liye strong banna chahti hoon, par main practically physically aur mentally toot chuki hoon. Sasu maa ki baatein mujhe lagatar yaad dilati hain ki main yahan unke ehsan par jee rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as culturally normal given the stigma and pressure of remarriage.
text: Tumhari is situation mein jahan ek taraf apni bacchi ki fikar hai aur dusri taraf society ka talaqshuda wala stigma laga hua hai, itni gehari exhaustion aur thakan mehsoos karna bilkul laazmi hai; is naye ghar ko mehnat se sambhalna tumhari sacchi lagan hai aur kisi ke taane tumhari asal identity define nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad mere actions meri lagan dikhate hain, par phir bhi mujhe guilty banaya jata hai. Aisa lagta hai ki remarried auraton ki bas yahi jagah hai ki wo gratitude aur ehsano ke tale sari zindagi chupchap dabi rahein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use a systemic anecdote to normalise the silent burden carried by women in second marriages.
text: Aisi second marriages mein jahan tano ka pressure hota hai, wahan ek maa ka duty ke bojh tale apna astitva bhool jana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj aur izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Koi nahi bolta. Par meri bacchi badi ho rahi hai. Agar main aisi hi depressed aur constantly tired rahungi toh uske childhood par kya asar padega? Mujhe masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi but at least apne mind ko shant rakhna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect on her enduring timeline of suppressing pain for her child's sake using Lens D.
text: Ek lambe arse se tumne apne andar ke sare stress aur ghutan ko lagatar daba kar sirf bacchi ko ek healthy environment dene ka anjaane mein effort kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish toh meri yahi rehti hai. Par physically ab saha nahi jaata mere se. Aise mein batao kya karoon ki bacchi ke samne main thodi stable reh sakun bina ghar ke kisi kaam ko hilaaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide quick, unintrusive coping options she can integrate into her heavy duties.
text: Agar hum inn chhoti koshishon ki baat karein jo tumhari duties ko bina roke ho sakein, toh kya tum din mein ek baar washroom mein sirf 2 minute aankein band karke gahri saans le sakti ho, ya subah sabke uthne se thoda pehle 5 minute balcony mein khadi ho sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah sabse pehle toh main hi uthti hoon kaam shuru karne, so balcony is out. Par washroom wala time main nikal sakti hoon. Wahan koi check nahi karta ki main kitni der ruki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide step-by-step guidance for the single actionable step she chose.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki jab bhi sasu maa ke taane se ghutan zyada feel ho, chupchap washroom jao, thande pani ke chheente munh par maaro aur wahan sirf do minute ke liye gehari saans lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main definitely kar sakti hoon. It sounds very basic, par mujhe waqai mein ek aisi jagah ki zarurat hai jahan main do minute ke liye proper saans le sakun bina soche ki kya bura hone wala hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise the stressor by reframing the systemic blame away from her.
text: Asal mein yeh jo taane mil rahe hain, ye aksar society ke purane prejudice aur talaqshuda status ko le kar banaye gaye darr ka nateeja hain, na ki tumhari kisi kamzori ka; is chhote break se dimaag ko in pressures ke beech clear rehne mein madad milti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I absolutely agree. Their issues are about my existence, not my work. Chahe main pure ghar ko akele chala lu, they will always see the label before they see my effort.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the fear that her efforts won't change their perspective using Lens E.
text: Kahin na kahin ek gehara khauf hamesha bana rehta hai ki tum kitni bhi sacrifices de do, is ghar mein shayad tumhari asal pehchan aur mehnat ko kabhi recognize hi nahi kiya jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Recognition nahi chahiye mujhe. Mujhe bas peace chahiye. Lekin society ke norms hi aise hain ki recognition ke bina basic respect nahi milti. That's why masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi, to ensure my daughter survives this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask her to project how the small break will influence her resilience moving forward.
text: Jab aane wale kal mein tum is nayi do-minute wali aadat ko apni daily masheen jaisi routine mein use karogi, toh andar ke us shor mein tumhe kis tarah ke sukoon ya fayde ki umeed dikhti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe umeed hai ki us pal main yaad rakhungi ki main sirf ek 'bojh' nahi hoon. Main apni bacchi ki shield hoon. Wo break mujhe ground karega jab taane unbearable ho jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her strong maternal identity and strength.
text: Bilkul sahi kaha tumne, un palon mein tum sirf ek majboot maa ho jo apna rasta khud bana rahi hai; aur in bhari halaaton mein aisi choti koshish se apne andar ke confidence ko zinda rakhna tumhari sabse badi taqat ka saboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for validating me. Mere mind mein hamesha bohot guilt rehta tha apni bacchi ki situation ko lekar, that I brought her into this setup. Par I am honestly trying my very best.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how her duty is tied to past guilt and responsibility using Lens B.
text: Apni bacchi ke kal ko secure karne ki zimmedari ke dauran, past ki situation ko le kar tumne ek bohot bada guilt apne farz aur duties ke sath internally jod liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi
text: Yes, wahi guilt mujhse yeh extreme hard work karwata hai. Mujhe lagta hai ki uski is life ki zimmedar main hoon, isliye to pay for it, mujhe masheen ki tarah bina thake duty karni hi padegi chahe meri himmat chhut jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the guilt as a societal byproduct of single/remarried motherhood.
text: Society ke is dhache mein remarried auraton ke oopar saari chuk ki saza ka bojh daal diya jata hai, jis wajah se khud ko punish karna aur hadd se zyada overwork karna uss guilt ko balance karne ka ek aam reaction ban jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Punish karna is the exact phrase. Main sach mein khud ko hi saza de rahi hoon in sab logon ke tano ko accept karke. I really need to stop beating myself up internally over what happened.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her new self-compassion shifting away from self-blame using Lens C.
text: Naye rishton ki is uljhan mein rehte hue bhi, ab tum khud par society ke diye gaye blame ki jagah, thoda zyada reham aur compassion dikhane ka irada kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Compassion toh chahiye khud ke liye. Main start unhi 2 minutes se karungi. Sasu maa ka behavior main control nahi kar sakti, but main kaise react kar rahi hoon wo main control karna seekhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Cement her commitment to the change by visualizing the next immediate step.
text: Ab jab tumne ek concrete soch bana li hai, toh agle din jab unke taane sunne ko milenge toh tumhara pehla andaruni kadam kya hoga apni himmat banaye rakhne ke liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera pehla kadam hoga silently remind karna khud ko ki my work is just a transaction for a roof, not a definition of who I am. And then I will go wash my face and breathe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation of her strength and the practical steps she's taking to cope.
text: Tumhara yeh jazba sach mein kabile tareef hai jahan tumne apni keemat ko is situation aur tano se alag karna seekha hai; ek maa ke nate tumhari ye choti par gehari koshish us sahare ko aur bhi majboot banayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye
text: Mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye. Naye sasural mein adjustment waise hi mushkil tha, upar se aaj Saas ne keh diya ki unki beti ke sanskar mujh jaisi aurat se kahin behtar hain. Meri kamar rasoi aur bacchon ke double kaam se toot chuki hai, par divorce ka stigma aisa hai ki main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti. Mere paas rone ka option hi nahi hai, kyunki is financial precarity ke beech yahi karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame and the burden of keeping the household obligations despite physical pain.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki is ghar mein bane rehne aur apne bacchon ke liye, tumhe apni thakan ko bhula kar saari zimmedariyan bina kisi shikayat ke poori karni hi hongi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine complain ki toh mujhe hi char baatein sunayenge ki divorce lekar baithi aurat ke kya sanskar honge. Main kisi aur par bojh nahi banna chahti, isliye sab sun leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue by softly mirroring the feared consequence.
text: Yeh darr ki log tumhari himmat ko divorce ke stigma aur sanskar se jod denge, tumhe apna dard chupane par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Subah se rasoi mein lagi rehti hoon, par sasu maa ko lagta hai unki beti ne hi duniya ka sabse bada kaam kiya hai. Main toh jaise unke liye free ki naukrani hoon jiski apni koi zarurat nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational isolation and lack of appreciation.
text: Itni mehnat karne ke bawajood jab tumhe apne hi ghar mein bina zaruraton wali sirf ek free ki naukrani jaisa mehsoos karwaya jata hai, toh bohot akela lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye
text: Akela toh lagta hai, par mere paas koi aur option bhi toh nahi hai. Financial precarity itni hai ki mujhe apne aur bacchon ke khane ke liye ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how she manages the physical and mental toll given the long-term duration of this pressure.
text: Apne aur bacchon ke future ko bachane ke liye din-ba-din itna bhari dabaav uthana, aur ek din bhi aaram ki ummeed na rakhna, tumhari kamar aur himmat par kitna asar daal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Asar toh aisa hai ki raat ko sote waqt pair sunn ho jate hain aur subah uthne ka bilkul mann nahi karta. Par phir sasu maa ki wo taane wali aawaz yaad aati hai aur mai masheen ki tarah uth ke rasoi me lag jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying exhaustion stemming from the fear of disappointing the family or being ousted.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki in lagatar taano aur bacchon ko bachane ke farz ne tumhe poori tarah se EXHAUST kar diya hai, aur yeh ek aisi thakan hai jisme darr tumse aaram karne ka haq bhi cheen leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exhausted bhi aur helpless bhi. Mere apne parents ko bhi tention nahi de sakti, unhone badi mushkil se pehli shadi se mujhe nikala tha. Ab main dubara unpe bojh nahi ban sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her sacrifice and normalise the distress caused by the stigma of multiple marriages/divorce in India.
text: Humaare samaj mein jahan divorce ke stigma ke darr se ek aurat ko itna kuch sehna padta hai, wahan apne ma-baap aur bacchon ko bachane ke liye tumhara itna bada boj akele uthana sach mein tumhari bohot badi taqat hai. Is unfair dabaav ke beech tumhari physical thakan poori tarah jayaz hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqat ka toh pata nahi, par lagta hai jaise main ek second-hand citizen hoon is ghar me. Sasu maa jis tarah compare karti hain, mujhe lagta hai shayad sach mein mujhme hi koi khot hai jo main perfect nahi ban pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue by softly mirroring her self-doubt.
text: Lagaatar is tarah ke comparisons sun kar, tumhe apne andar hi koi kami nazar aane lag gayi hai ki shayad main hi kisi cheez ke layak nahi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye
text: Haan, ye doubt hamesha dimag mein rehta hai. Par ab is doubt ke sath jite jite main physically haar rahi hoon. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kaise handle karoon, mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye. Batao kya karoon main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote normalizing the struggle of women burdened by divorce stigma in a new sasural.
text: Ek naye sasural mein, jahan past ka koi stigma juda ho, wahan khud ko mita kar 'perfect bahu' banne ki koshish karna humare yahan bohot common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki society 'adjust' karne ka poora dabaav ek aurat par hi daalti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, adjust karte karte main khud hi toot gayi hoon. Par ab mujhe aage chalne ke liye kuch rasta chahiye. Rasoi me khade hone ka mann nahi kar raha aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally acceptable suggestions that fit within her immediate duty-bound routine to give her physical relief.
text: Kya hum kal se is lagatar duty ke beech choti si physical rahat nikal sakte hain? Jaise jab tum sabzi kaat rahi ho, toh usko slab pe khade reh kar karne ke bajaye ek stool par baith kar akele rasoi mein kaatna, ya phir rasoi saaf hone ke baad jab sab tv dekh rahe ho toh bas 5 minute bina phone dekhe baith jana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabzi stool pe baith ke kaatna thoda practical lag raha hai. Usme time waste nahi hoga, jo sasu maa ko chahiye wo time pe mil jayega aur mere pairo ko thoda aaram milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen step in a structured, immediate way.
text: Pehle kal subah jab tum khana banane rasoi mein jao, toh wahan turant ek chhota stool nikal kar rakh lena... phir baith kar sabziyan kaatna shuru karna... bas itna hi kal ki shuruaat ke liye karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye
text: Haan, yeh main kar sakti hoon. Mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye, par agar thodi physical thakan kam hogi toh shayad main is dabaav ko lambe samay tak bardaasht kar paun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe regarding the constant comparisons and her feelings of being 'second-hand'.
text: Yeh dhyan rakhna zaroori hai ki 'sanskar' aur comparisons ka yeh sara game humari society ka banaya hua ek dabaav hai, jiska tumhari sachhi qeemat ya mehnat se koi lena dena nahi hai; yeh unki limited soch hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki yeh baat mujhe andar se himmat de rahi hai. Main soch rahi thi ki saari kami mujh mein hi hai, par nahi, sasu maa ko bas complain karne ki aadat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from self-blame to recognizing the external source of the criticism.
text: Jo darr pehle tumhe khud ko kamzor mehsoos kara raha tha, ab tumne dekh liya hai ki yeh unki complain karne ki aadat hai, tumhari koi khot nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main apna farz karungi bacchon ke liye, par unki baaton ko ab dil pe lena band karna padega mujhe. Warna main mentally bhi khatam ho jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her ground herself with a protective thought during the suggested physical action.
text: Jab kal tum us stool par baith kar apna farz poora karogi, toh unke taano ke aage apne dimag aur dil ko bacha kar rakhne ke liye apne bacchon ka kaun sa khayal yaad rakhogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas unka muskuraata chehra yaad rakhungi, aur ye sochungi ki meri is mehnat se unka pet bhar raha hai aur unka future safe hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she centers her duty on the positive outcome for her children rather than the mother-in-law's approval.
text: Apne bacchon ke muskurate chehre aur unke safe future ka khayal tumhe sasu maa ke tano se alag aur mazboot banaye rakhega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere paas in baaton se upset hone ka time bhi nahi hai. Mujhe meri energy bas bacchon ke liye bachani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure her strength in making this conscious choice to protect her energy.
text: Apni bachi hui energy ko faltu baaton mein kharch na karke, usay apne bacchon ke liye bachane ka yeh faisla sach mein tumhari samajhdaari aur himmat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye
text: Thank you for saying that. Main roz raat ko roti thi yehi soch kar ki shayad main har gayi hoon. Abhi bhi mujhe ishi ghar ke saare obligations poore karne hain taaki humein nikala na jaye, par ab shayad andar se ro-ro ke nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her shift from helplessness to active perseverance over time.
text: Itne dinon ki us rone wali thakan aur haar ki feeling ke baad, ab aage ka yahi lamba rasta tumhe ek nayi mazbooti ke sath tay karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main pakka kal stool use karungi aur try karungi apne pe bhi dhyan dene ki, jitna possible ho sake is ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a simple forward-looking question to reinforce the plan.
text: Kal ke is chote badlav ke liye, kya tum aaj raat hi rasoi mein woh stool nikal kar tayar rakhogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, main abhi khane ke baad kitchen saaf karte waqt usko table ke neeche se nikal kar aage hi rakh dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her immediate action.
text: Aaj raat ka yeh chota sa farz apne aaram ke liye poora karke, kal ki shuruaat aasan ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji zarur. Aapne bohot himmat di mujhe aaj. Ab sasu maa mujhe wapas rasoi mein bula rahi hain bacchon ke doodh ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating closing statement.
text: Yeh naya rasta jo tumne apne baccho aur apne aaram ko sath le kar banaya hai, wahi tumhari sahi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhanyawad. Main apna dhyan rakhungi ab. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End conversation safely as she returns to her obligations.
text: Abhi ke is raat wale kaam ke baad, apne liye nikala gaya kal ka waqt zarur mehsoos karna, apna khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Aaj fir Saas ne comparison karte hue kaha ki unki beti ne kabhi parivaar ka naam kharab nahi kiya, jabki meri kundali mein hi dosh hai isliye pehla rishta toota. Main is naye ghar ke bojh tale dab chuki hoon, par 'log kya kahenge' ki dusri shaadi bhi nahi chali, is darr se lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon. Mujhe pata hai main physically aur mentally khatam ho rahi hoon, par main ek minute ka break afford nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the role/duty frame, validating the pressure of acting as a machine to preserve the marriage.
text: Tumhara poora din is ghar ke kaam mein ek masheen ki tarah nikal jata hai, kyunki tumhe lagta hai ki yahi ek aakhiri tareeqa hai is doosri shaadi aur ghar ko bachane ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Haan, aur koi rasta hi nahi hai. Pehla rishta tootne ka saara blame mere sir par hai. Saas bolti hain ki meri kundali mein dosh hai, isliye main bas chupchaap lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon, taaki is baar koi ungli na uthaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of society blaming them again.
text: Is darr se ki kahin wapas society aur biradari mein naam kharab na ho jaye, tum khud ko poori tarah thaka kar bas sabko chup rakhne ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khush rakhna toh door ki baat hai, bas tano se bachna chahti hoon. Jab log aate hain toh saas 'log kya kahenge' bol kar mujhe aage kar deti hain kaam ke liye. Aisa lagta hai ki meri koi izzat hi nahi bachi is parivaar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational dynamic of constant taunts destroying their sense of self-respect.
text: Aise taano aur logon ke samne baar-baar khud ko sabit karne ke pressure mein, apni khud ki izzat aur wajood bilkul dhundhla sa lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Wajood toh pehle rishte ke sath hi khatam ho gaya tha. Ab toh bas naye ghar ka farz nibha rahi hoon. Main lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon, chahe meri himmat chhoot rahi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the long duration and relentless nature of the physical and mental toll.
text: Pichle itne lambe waqt se lagatar yeh saara shaaririk aur mansik bojh akele uthate hue, tumhari himmat jawab dene lagi hai par tum ek pal ke liye ruk nahi paa rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rukungi toh yeh ghar bhi hath se nikal jayega. Par sach bataun, kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod doon. Lekin mere maika wale bhi wapas nahi apnayenge. Wo kehte hain ek doosri shaadi wali aurat ka ghar sasural hi hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used soft restatement in response to the stigma cue to acknowledge the profound isolation without judgment.
text: Jab apne maike wale bhi darwaze band kar lete hain, toh wahan se akelapan thoda aur gehra ho jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Gehra akelapan hi hai. Koi samajhne wala nahi hai is duniya mein. Main is ghar ki chaar deewari mein akele roti hoon, aur phir aansu ponch kar kitchen mein chali jati hoon kaam karne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the deep feeling of being trapped and exhausted now that the core conflict of having nowhere else to go was named.
text: Baaton se aisa lagta hai ki is doosri shaadi ke itne bhari expectations aur kahin aur asra na hone ke karan, tum ek bahut gehri EXHAUSTION aur helpless trap mein phans chuki ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Trap hi toh hai ye. Sab meri kismat, mera dosh bolte hain kundali dekh kar. Jaise main koi insaan hi nahi hoon, sirf ek galti hoon jise din raat kaam karke khud ko theek sabit karna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated their feeling of suffocation as a culturally common unfair burden placed on women, separating their worth from the taunts.
text: Tumhara yeh ghutan mehsoos karna bilkul jayaz hai. Hamari society mein aurton par, khaas taur pe doosri shaadi mein, rishta nibhane ka itna bojh daal diya jata hai ki unki value mitne lagti hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki sach mein koi dosh tumhare andar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin jab har roz subah yahi sab sunna padta hai toh lagta hai shayad wahi sach hai. Aurat ka dharam yahi bataya gaya hai, saas ki baat suno aur kaam karo. Maine maan liya tha ki yahi kismat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a systemic anecdote about how women in second marriages face similar stigma, to normalize her experience.
text: Hamare aise parivaaron mein doosri shaadi wali aurton ke sath aisi shartein aur kadwa bartao bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka dukh nahi hai yeh, lekin koi bahu khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj aur izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Koi bolti nahi par sab roti hain akele mein. Main isliye darti thi ki shayad sach mein mujhme kami ho. Thoda halka lag raha hai sun kar ki main akele is sab ka shikar nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relief from letting go of the feared consequence of being inherently flawed.
text: Khud ko hamesha galat samajhne ka woh gehra darr aur akele thakte jaane ka bojh, aaj thoda kam lag raha hai kyunki tumhe dikh raha hai ki yeh saari galti tumhari nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Galti meri nahi hai, theek hai. Par ab kya karoon? Ghar ka kaam toh subah se raat tak karna hi padega, saas ke taane bhi rukenge nahi. Mujhe bas is sab ke beech thodi saans lene ka koi raasta batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two quick, duty-compatible suggestions to create micro-moments of peace without altering her obligations.
text: Ghar ki un sari lagatar zimmedariyon ke beech khud ki saans lene ke liye hum 2-3 choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh dopahar mein kaam ke baad tum 10 minute akele chat par ja kar baith sakti ho, ya phir kitchen mein akele kaam karte waqt apna pasand ka koi purana bhajan dheemi aawaz mein phone par sun sakti ho. Kya asaan lagta hai tumhare liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dopahar mein chat par jana toh mushkil hai, saas turant poochhengi kahan gayi thi apna kaam chhod kar. Par kitchen mein akele sabzi kat-te waqt apna bhajan sun sakti hoon main apne earphone lagakar. Aisa lagega ki andar se kuch apne liye kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the simple kitchen listening step logically and gently.
text: Toh phir kal se jab tum akele kitchen mein sabzi kaatne baitho... toh pehle earphone lagana... phir dheemi aawaz mein apni pasand ka woh bhajan chalana... bas itna hi us thode se waqt mein apne mann ko shant karne ke liye karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh aaraam se ho jayega. Bhajan sunte waqt shayad mera dhyan unke taano se hat jaye aur meri rooh ko thoda sukoon mile. Kam se kam is ghar mein mera ek chota sa kona toh banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframed how women are treated as machines to maintain the family structure, validating her small act of resistance.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki patriarchal gharon mein aurton ko masheen maan liya jata hai taaki parivaar ka status aur aaram chalta rahe, isme tumhari bhool nahi hai, aur aise mein apna ek shaant kona dhoondhna apne wajood ko bachane jaisa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha apne. Main apna wajood aise khatam nahi hone dungi. Abhi tak main bas dosh aur darr ke sahare ji rahi thi, par ye 10 minute mere khud ke honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift in her role performance during those 10 minutes.
text: Un dus minute ke liye tum inki bahu ya sirf kaam karne wali koi member nahi hogi, balki sirf aur sirf khud ko waqt dene wali ek insaan hogi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon
text: Bilkul. Bahar se chahe main waise hi dikhu, chahe lagatar masheen bankar kaam kiye ja rahi hoon unke aage, par mere andar ka hissa ab unki mohtaj nahi rahega. Main mentally khud ko alag kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the inner strength she found in preserving her mental boundary despite the physical labor.
text: Mujhe tumhari in baaton mein ek nayi takat dikh rahi hai. Apne mann ki shanti ko aisi mushkil sthiti mein bhi internally bachaye rakhna dikhata hai ki tumhari himmat kabhi tooti hi nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tooti nahi, bas dab gayi thi darr se. Par ab main unke 'log kya kahenge' wale logic ko apne dimag se nikalne ki koshish karungi. Kam se kam kitchen me toh main free rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the release from the feared consequence.
text: Ab tumne yeh tay kar liya hai ki samaj aur biradari ka darr tumhari andar ki us choti si azaadi ko kharab nahi kar payega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi kar payega. Unhe taane marne hain toh marein. Agar kundali mein itna hi dosh hota toh mere akele bina is ghar ka ek din bhi theek se nahi chalta. Meri ahmiyat mere kaam se hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a final systemic reframe showing how taunts are used to mask the family's complete dependency on her labor.
text: Aksar taano aur kismat ka hawala de kar aurton ko control mein rakha jata hai taaki wo apne rights na maangein, jabki poore ghar ka wajood aur aaram tumhari akele ki mehnat par hi tika hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat ekdum sateek kahi aapne. Main bimar pad gayi to in sabka ek din nahi nikalna. Mere andar is nayi samajh se bada sukoon mil raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the newly found confidence replacing the earlier helplessness.
text: Mujhe is waqt tumhari aawaz mein ek thehrao aur CONFIDENCE mehsoos ho raha hai, jo pehle ki us sari helplessness aur darr ki jagah le raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thehrao aa gaya hai thoda. Situation wahi hai bahar, log wahi hain, par mere dekhne ka tareeqa badal gaya hai. Main kal pakka bhajan sunungi earphone par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the new relational boundary established between her inner self and the outside taunts.
text: Gharwalon aur saas ka bartao bhale hi na badle, par tumne apne andar ek aisi boundary bana li hai jahan unke kadwe shabd ab sidhe chot nahi pahunchayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Boundary. Yeh shabd acha hai. Main is adrishya boundary ko bahut strongly protect karungi. Khaskar jab kitchen mein mera bhajan chal raha hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration and future outlook of claiming her small moments.
text: Woh aage aane wale roz ke kuch minutes sach mein tumhare din ka sabse mazboot hissa banne wale hain, jahan tum lagatar apne wajood ko sambhalti rahogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aapse baat karke mujhe himmat mili, lag raha tha pagal ho jaungi akele. Ab mujhe sham ke khane ki tayyari karni hai. Sukriya waqt dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closed with warmth, validating her worth and courage to face her reality differently.
text: Tumhari is himmat aur naye jazbe ko dekh kar mujhe bohut tasalli hui, yaad rakhna tum poori tarah se kaabil aur izzat ke layaq ho, apna aur apne un 10 minute ka ache se khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti
text: Mehmaano ke samne aaj Saas ne mujhe sunate hue kaha ki unki beti sarvgun-sampann hai aur main ek single mother hokar is ghar par bojh hoon. Community exclusion ke darr se main is naye parivaar ki har zidd bina uff kiye poori kar rahi hoon, bhale hi meri tangein thakan se kaanp rahi ho. Agar maine zara si bhi kamzori dikhayi toh meri nayi shaadi mein kalesh ho jayega, isliye main thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol with a short, soft reflection of the role and obligations.
text: Naye ghar ke farz aur community exclusion ke darr se aap bina uff kiye sab jhel rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine kuch bola toh log kahenge dekho single mother hai, isiliye pehla ghar bhi nahi basa. Mere bache ka kya hoga agar ye shaadi bhi toot gayi? Bas wahi soch kar main din bhar kaam mein lagi rehti hoon, physical pain ko ignore karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the endless duration and continuous nature of ignoring the pain.
text: Subah se lekar raat tak bache ki khaatir aap yeh thakan lagataar bardasht kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kar bhi kya sakti hoon? Biradari mein izzat toh dikhani padegi. Saas ke taane chubhte hain bahut, but I just swallow it. It feels like mere wajood ki yahan koi value nahi hai, sirf mere ghar ke kaam ki value hai. Kalesh hua toh sab mujhe hi dosh denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue by softly reflecting the fear of conflict and stopping with a pause.
text: Kalesh ka yeh darr har waqt aapko apna dard chupane par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek dum saans lene ki fursat nahi milti. Kabhi lagta hai kab tak chalega ye sab? Mere bache ke future ke liye I have to secure this place, par andar hi andar main toot rahi hoon. Thakan itni hoti hai ki raat ko nind nahi aati theek se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe underneath the duty to explore what happens to her unexpressed emotions.
text: Itne pressure aur thakan ke bawajood jab aap bache ke future ke liye sab kuch akele utha rahi hain, toh aapke apne emotions kahan jate hain is saare farz ke beech?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mere emotions? Wo toh jaise mar gaye hain. Main bas ek machine ban gayi hoon is naye ghar mein. Pura din kitchen, ghar, aur phir inki umeedein. Mere andar bs exhaustion aur guilt bhara hua hai ki kya main apne bache ko ek healthy mahaul de paa rahi hoon? Ya main bas ek samjhauta jee rahi hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of exhaustion beneath the duty frame.
text: Lagta hai is biradari aur expectations ke bojh tale aap khud ko completely exhausted mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan bache ke naye ghar ke khatir aapne khud ki feelings ko poori tarah mita diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti
text: Sahi kaha. Doosri shaadi karna jaise koi crime ho gaya ho is society mein. I feel completely helpless. Main bas thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti, kyunki ek aur failure society accept nahi karegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol by restating the role constraint and the societal judgment.
text: Single mother hone ka taana aur society ke failure ka darr aapko apne farz se hattne nahi de raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log bas mauka dhoondhte hain aurat ko blame karne ka. Khaskar ek aurat jo akele bache ko lekar aayi ho. Saas isi baat ka fayda uthati hain, batane ke liye ki unki beti kitni sarvgun-sampann hai aur main kitni defective. Mujhe kabhi kabhi apne aap se hi chidh hone lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize her reaction and separate her worth from the mother-in-law's taunts.
text: Aap jo itni mehnat kar rahi hain apne bache ke liye, us thakan aur chidh ko mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Naye ghar mein adjust karna aasan nahi hota, par yeh saas ke taane aur biradari ka darr aapki asli value ya ek bohut achi mother hone ko define nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sun ke thoda sukoon mila. Mere paas koi nahi hai jisse main ye sab khul kar bol sakun. Mayke wale kehte hain ki bas ab yahi tera ghar hai, jaise bhi ho adjust kar. It feels so isolating. Ek dum akela padh gayi hoon main is nayi family mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a brief systemic anecdote about young brides/remarried women burying their distress.
text: Aisi doosri shaadi mein aurton ka apne dard ko chupana aur akele sab jhelna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein nayi shaadi aur parivaar ki izzat ka pressure sabse upar hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kitni ajeeb baat hai na ye samaj ki izzat. Sab ko dikhawa karna hai. I know main akeli nahi hoon, but it doesn't make the physical exhaustion any less. Roz subah uth kar wahi saari duty. Mujhe darr hai kisi din mera shareer poori tarah jawaab na de de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element where physical wellbeing is compromised for the family.
text: Bacho aur is naye parivaar ke chakkar mein aapne khud ke shareer ki capacity ko bilkul side mein rakh diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Rakhna padta hai. But meri tangein literally kaanpti hain raat tak. Ab kya karoon main? Main apni duty toh nahi chhod sakti, par main is thakan ke sath aur kitne din chalungi? Koi raasta hai kya thoda araam paane ka bina kalesh kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide short, feasible suggestions that fit into her duties without causing conflict.
text: Apne farz ke beech hum thakan kam karne ke liye do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, jab aap kitchen mein hon toh 5 minute ek stool rakh kar baith kar sabzi kaatein bajaye khade rehne ke. Dusra, dopahar ko bache ke homework ke waqt 10 minute uske sath hi bed par let kar padhayen. Inmein se aapke liye kya practical lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kitchen mein baith kar sabzi kaatna feasible hai. Agar saas ne pucha toh main keh dungi ki slab par jagah nahi thi. Bache ke sath letne par toh unhe aalas lagega aur baatein banayengi. I think pehla wala idea better hai, it gives my legs a small break without a scene.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the stool suggestion into a concrete step.
text: Pehle yeh karo, jab bhi sabzi kaatni ho ya chota kaam ho, ek chota stool kitchen mein kisi kone mein rakh lo aur uspe baith jao... phir apna kaam wahi aaram se karo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna bina kisi guilty feeling ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ek plastic stool nikal lungi main aaj se hi. Kam se kam lagataar khade rehne ka physical strain toh thoda kam hoga meri tangon par. But mental exhaustion ka kya karun? Wo tano ki aawaz dimag mein ghoomti rehti hai ki main perfect nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the persistent taunts on her mind.
text: Thodi der ke liye hi sahi, par un taano ko sun kar lagta hai ki aapki saari mehnat aur balidan jaise bekar ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, absolutely. Aisa lagta hai I am running a race I can never win. Main kabhi 'sarvgun-sampann' nahi ban paungi unki nazron mein, because mere mathhe par purani shaadi ke tootne ka tag laga hai. But I have to pretend I don't care.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol by keeping it short and soft-ended.
text: Aapka apne bache ke bare mein soch kar is society ke tag aur in taano ko sehna...

speaker: Seeker
text: I endure it all for him. Main chahti hoon use ek stable father figure mile, ek poora parivaar mile. Uske liye main apne saare aasu pee leti hoon. But andar hi andar mujhe darr lagta hai ki ye negativity mere bache par asar na daale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion as structural rather than personal.
text: Logon ki baaton se bache par asar padne ka darr hona natural hai, par yeh exhausted aur unappreciated feel karna aapki galti nahi hai, balki is culture ka hissa hai jahan ek nayi bahu se unrealistic ummeedein rakhi jati hain aur single mothers ko jaldi accept nahi kiya jata.

speaker: Seeker
text: You are right. Unrealistic is the word. Wo ek perfect bahu chahti hain jo ex-wife ya single mother na ho. Par main unhe badal toh nahi sakti. Mujhe bas apna mind thoda strong karna hoga is se deal karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a mental reframe to help manage the taunts internally.
text: Mujhe samajh aa raha hai ki aap ab apna nazariya badalna chahti hain. Kya hum yeh try karein ki jab bhi taana mile, toh dimag mein khud ko remind karein ki yeh unki conservative soch hai, aapki reality nahi? Ya phir raat ko sone se pehle bache ki ek achi baat yaad kar ke soyein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko sone se pehle apne bache ki achi baatein yaad karna acha lag raha hai. It will shift my focus from saas's words to my real priority. My son. Usko sote hue dekh kar thodi thakan waise hi door ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the child brings peace amidst the ongoing family tension.
text: Bina kisi naye kalesh ke bache ki maasoomiyat aur muskaan aapko aage badhne ki himmat aur sukoon de deti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti
text: Yes. Wahi meri aakhiri umeed aur taqat hai. Main janti hoon kal subah phir se wahi taane aur responsibilities hongi. Main thakan bhula kar ghar ke farz nibhane se peeche nahi hat sakti. Lekin I will try to sit in the kitchen, and focus on my child at night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the acceptance of duration alongside the new tiny breaks she is creating.
text: Situation shayad turant na badle aur aapke farz lagataar chalte rahenge, par aapne un farzon ke beech apne bache aur khud ke liye thodi si jagah zaroor bana li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ek choti si hi jagah sahi. That's all I need to survive this phase. Mujhe lagta tha ki main weak pad rahi hoon, but maybe endurance requires this kind of smart management. Thodi der rest le lena, aur saas ki baaton ko dil par na lagana.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final systemic reframe reinforcing her strength instead of weakness.
text: Yeh samajhna ki poora system ek single mother ke against structured hota hai, aapko madad karega khud par harsh na hone mein. Aap weak bilkul nahi hain, aap bas ek bahut unfair situation ko apne bache ke liye samajhdari se manage kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. 'Unfair situation' sun kar bahot validation mili. Mujhe baar baar yahi guilt hota tha ki main hi theek se nayi shadi nibha nahi paa rahi. Now I see it for what it is. Sham ka waqt ho gaya hai, ab chai aur khana banane jana padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the return to her role as the evening chores begin.
text: Shaam ke is thake hue waqt mein bhi aap bina shikyat wapas apne farz nibhane ja rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, back to the grind. Lekin aaj dimag thoda halka hai. Stool nikal kar sabzi katungi aaram se. Aur in taano ko ab bilkul personal nahi lungi. Meri baatein sunne ke liye bahut shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final affirmation of her resilience and maternal dedication.
text: Yeh yaad rakhna ki aapki lagan aur apne bache ke liye ye saare sacrifices aapko ek behtareen maa banate hain. Jab bhi thakan zyada lage, un chote breaks aur apne bache ki muskaan ko apni taqat bana lena.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai
text: Bina dowry ke unhone mujhe apnaya hai, ye yaad dilate hue Saas ne aaj fir apni beti se meri tulna ki aur mere past ko leke taana maara. Is naye ghar mein thodi si acceptance paane aur apne bacche ka future secure karne ke chakkar mein main ek masdoor ban gayi hoon jise rukne ki ijazat nahi hai. Andar se poori tarah nichudi hone ke bawajood, mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the heavy duty and sacrifice she is undertaking for her child's future.
text: Tumhari baaton se lag raha hai ki is naye ghar mein sab kuch sambhalne ki koshish mein, tum khud ko bhula chuki ho aur us thakan ke bawajood duty poori karne ka bojh lagatar utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padta hai na. Mera past thoda complex raha hai, aur unhone mujhe bina dowry ke apne ghar mein jagah di hai, toh uska ehsaan mujhe zindagi bhar chukana padega. Mera baccha yahan safe rahe, bas yahi soch kar saare taane sun leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feared consequence of her child's future being ruined if she doesn't comply.
text: Apne bacche ki safety aur uske aane wale kal ke darr ki wajah se tum har roz yeh sab chupchap sehne par khud ko majboor kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... agar maine kuch bola ya react kiya, toh seedha asar mere bache ki izzat par aayega. Saas kehti hain ki unhone to reham kha liya mujhpe. Main sach mein is ghar ke ek kone mein ek machine ki tarah ban chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational strain of constantly being reminded of her place in the house.
text: Jab roz ye sunna pade ki tumhari jagah is ghar mein sirf unke reham ki wajah se hai, toh us akelepan aur taano ke beech machine ban jana lazmi sa lagne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akeli hi hoon main yahan. Kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki mere past ki wajah se shayad main is layak hi nahi ki koi mujhe acceptance de... samaj mein mera ye daag mujhe wese bhi dusri aurton se kamtar bana deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her internalized stigma and fear softly without judgment.
text: Tumhe lagne laga hai ki tumhare us past ki wajah se shayad tum hamesha kamtar hi samjhi jaogi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, society mein shadi ko leke ek baar kuch upar neeche ho jaye, toh aurat ki value waise hi zero ho jati hai. Maine socha tha yahan shayad thodi izzat milegi, par yahan bhi main bas ek unpaid masdoor hoon jise sabke hisaab se chalna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe gently on how she is surviving this immense daily burden.
text: Bina kisi acceptance ke har roz ek masdoor ki tarah akele khate rehna kitna mushkil hota hoga, is sab thakan ke beech tum khud ko duty ke liye zinda kaise rakhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai
text: Zinda kahan hoon? Bas saansein chal rahi hain. Subah se kuch khaya nahi hai aur neend bhi theek se aati nahi aajkal. Par koi option nahi hai, mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai taaki koi kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize her physical symptoms of distress and reflect the duration of her exhaustion.
text: Bhookh ka mar jana aur neend na aana is lagatar chalne wale dabaw ka ek bohot normal asar hai. Itne lambe samay se bina ruke sabka dhyan rakhna, tumhe andar se poori tarah thaka chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan to meri kismat ban gayi hai. Bachhe ke samne main apna dard nahi dikhati, ki wo darr na jaye. Is ghar mein kisi ko fark nahi padta ki main andar se khatam ho chuki hoon, bas unka kaam chalna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the continuous role she plays despite having nothing left inside.
text: Itne mahino se bina ruke sabka dhyan rakhna, aur apni takleef ko bacche ke liye dabaye rakhna, ek aisi duty ban gayi hai jisme tumhari apni jagah kuch bachi hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Trapped hi hoon sach bataun toh. Main apne bache ki wajah se bandhi hui hoon is 'ehsaan' ke neeche. Uske future ke aage main itni majboor hoon ki rone ke alawa koi raasta nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the core unexpressed feeling of exhaustion and being trapped by her duty.
text: Lagta hai is ehsaan ko chukate-chukate aur saari duty akele uthate hue, tum andar se poori tarah exhausted aur trapped mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan is dabaav se nikalne ka koi sahara nahi dikhta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhaustion is the right word. Mujhe hamesha lagta tha mere past ki wajah se shayad main ye taane aur ye exhaustion hi deserve karti hoon. Ye soch-soch ke thakan dugni ho jati thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her sacrifices as culturally normal for mothers, separating her worth from the taunts.
text: Apne bache ke kal ke liye itna sab sehna, yeh hamare samaj mein bohot si maao ki pehchan bana di gayi hai, par iska matlab ye bilkul nahi ki in taano aur is poori thakan ke liye tum khud zimmedar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton se thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Izzat aur society ka darr meri saas har roz yaad dilati hain mujhe control karne ke liye. Kam se kam ab mujhe pata hai ki ye sirf mera akele ka failure nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote to normalize the 'ehsaan' burden placed on women with pasts.
text: Naye rishton mein, khas kar jahan aurat ke past ko lekar koi stigma ho, wahan duty aur ehsaan ke naam par daba ke rakhna bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki family honor ka dar sabko chup rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... rahat to ab dimaag mein hai par sach ye hai ki sab weise hi chalega raat hote hi. Koi raasta hai kya is suffocation se thoda bachne ka, jab main sach mein unke samne khadi hoti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the 'ehsaan' of no dowry as a structural tool for control before moving to suggestions.
text: Is baat ko samajhna zaroori hai ki bina dowry ke shaadi ko 'ehsaan' ki tarah jatana koi tumhara dosh nahi, ye sirf unki power aur control banaye rakhne ka ek aam tarika hai samaj mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai
text: I see that now. Ye unka power trip hai. Par aaj fir mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai, aur main wahan phirse panic nahi karna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggest culturally congruent grounding techniques she can do while maintaining her cooking duties.
text: Us achanak aane wale panic se bachne ke liye hum do chote tarike try kar sakte hain: ya toh kitchen ke kisi kaam par apna poora dhyan shift karo jaise sabzi katne ki awaaz, ya wahan se ek minute ke liye pani peene ke bahane hat jao.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pani peene jaungi to peechhe se aur taane sunne milenge. Sabzi katne ki aawaz wali trick theek lag rahi hai. I can easily do that without dropping my work.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the grounding exercise into immediate, actionable steps for tonight.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki jab bhi wo kuch taana kahein, apni saari attention us chaku aur sabzi par lagao… phir uski aawaz aur shape ko poore dhyan se notice karo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay. Bas itna hi. Main poora dhyan sabziyon pe divert karungi. Kam se kam is tarah unke shabd mere andar seedha utar nahi payenge aur main bach jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her courage in taking small steps to mentally protect herself.
text: Khud ko is tarah se mentally protect karne ka chota step lena bhi bohot himmat wala kaam hai, khas kar aise mahaul mein jahan aurat se sab kuch akele sehne ki umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat jutani padegi apne bacche ke liye. Aaj yahan is baare mein baat karke mere dil ka bojh thoda kam lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the core fear driving her need to stay composed.
text: Bache par tumhari in takleefon ka bura asar na pade, yahi darr tumhe aaj apni shanti ke liye ek naya tareeqa apnane par poori tarah prerit kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main usey yahan safe aur secure dekhna chahti hoon. Agar main hi andar se toot gayi to uska sahara kaun banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check in on her readiness to return to her duties tonight.
text: Apne bachhe ki safety ke is gehre ehsaas ke sath, kya abhi aaj ki duty karne jaane ke liye tum khud ko thoda mentally taiyaar mehsoos kar rahi ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj manage kar lungi main. Pehle lag raha tha jaise bas ye raat mujhe poori tarah khatam kar degi, but ab theek lag raha hai thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift in how she perceives the duration of the evening ahead.
text: Kuch der pehle jo samay bilkul ruka hua aur bhari lag raha tha, ab shayad thoda asani se katne layak lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kahan. Waqt to katega hi aur subah hogi. Taane bas unka power trip hai, isliye focus na karna hi best hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her new relational boundary between her reality and their power trip.
text: Ye samajh aana ki unke kadwe shabd sirf unka power trip hain, sach mein tumhare aur unke beech ek mazboot dimaagi deewar khadi kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Dimaag mein ye deewar zaroori hai mere bachne ke liye. Warna physically to unki saari duty waise bhi karni hi hai mujhe bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently explore if this new perspective gives her enough strength for the immediate future.
text: Dimaag mein is deewar ko banaye rakhne se, kya aage chalke is ehsaan wale bojh se andar hi andar thodi azaadi milne ki umeed dikh rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai
text: Umeed to hai. Aaj main jab jaungi, to yahi sochungi. Ab ye sochkar ki mujhe saare aansu nigal kar raat ke khane ki duty akele karni hai, pehle jaisa bada darr nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her decision to take it one day at a time, honoring her endurance.
text: Aaj ki raat ko bina darr ke face karne ka tumhara ye faisla sach mein tarif ke kabil hai. Jab bhi aage akelepan ka bojh bhari lage, hum yahan baat kar sakte hain.
